name: takawasi recon lesson quality QA
scope: Desktop QA only. Mobile QA is outside the active target.

steps: Reset campaign from the Theater UI.
Assigned the first recon side operation to unit-jaeger-1 / officer-keller.
Injected one bad-intel unit history and one officer intelligence-lesson history into the same saved campaign.
Reloaded the app and captured the same Theater recon preview.
scenario.injectedUnitHistory: QA: 敵情誤認下で交戦
scenario.injectedOfficerHistory: QA: 敵情誤認対応、偵察教訓を記録

notes: The recon preview and recon auto-resolve share calculateReconQuality, so the same lesson bonus path affects planning display and operation resolution.
The save was modified through browser developer protocol only for QA setup; the application persisted and displayed the resulting state after reload.
